title: phyllostegia wawrana
intro: Phyllostegia wawrana, also known as Hawaiian lilac, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia wawrana include its potential to relieve respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia wawrana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to calm the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
